name: claude-usage
description: Real-time Claude Code session and weekly token usage in the status bar. Reads live data from claude.ai (Firefox/Chrome) with local JSONL fallback.

claudeUsage.sessionLimitTokens.description: Session token limit for your plan (used for local fallback %). Pro=320000, Max5=1600000, Max20=6400000. Leave null to show raw counts.

claudeUsage.weeklyLimitTokens.description: Weekly token limit for your plan (used for local fallback %).

claudeUsage.weeklyModelLimits.description: Per-model weekly limits, e.g. { "sonnet": 436000, "haiku": 25000 }. Used for local fallback only.
